title: Sleep Planner
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Better sleep is a system, not a miracle.

This 105-page sleep planner is the practical, science-aligned tracker that turns "I don't sleep well" into a real strategy. Whether you're battling chronic insomnia or just want to wake up feeling human again, this is the offline reset your nervous system has been waiting for.

Who it's for:
- Adults with insomnia, restless sleep, or shift-work disruption
- People testing CBT-I, sleep restriction, or stimulus-control techniques
- Anyone tracking the effect of melatonin, magnesium, alcohol, or screen time
- Patients preparing for sleep-clinic or doctor visits

What's inside:
- 90-day sleep log: bedtime, wake time, time to fall asleep, awakenings, total hours
- Sleep quality 1-10, mood at wake, daytime energy crash points
- Pre-bed routine, caffeine, alcohol, and screen-time check-ins
- Weekly review: average hours, sleep efficiency, biggest disruptors
- Bedtime routine builder and 30-day habit reset
- Reference: sleep hygiene basics, what your circadian rhythm actually needs

Most sleep apps overload you with charts you can't act on. This planner forces clarity - one page, one night, one tweak. Fill it in for 30 days and most readers see a measurable shift.

Order today and reclaim your mornings, one good night at a time.
